name: search_courses
description: Search the entire Coursera course catalog by keyword, topic, or skill. Returns matching courses with titles, descriptions, partner names, ratings, difficulty levels, and estimated completion times. Supports pagination and field selection.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search type. Use 'search' for keyword search.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Linked resources to include (e.g., partnerIds to get institution names).

elements.name: Machine Learning
elements.description: Learn about the most effective machine learning techniques...
